title: Command Salon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Command Salon''' was an officer rest area on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''
